tools.name: SearchSaasTool
tools.description: Search the SaaS Browser database of 400k+ SaaS companies. Filter by category, technology, country, pricing, traffic, employees, age, and more. Returns up to 25 results with profile URLs.

tools.name: SearchCategoriesTool
tools.description: Search SaaS Browser categories by name or keyword. Returns matching category IDs for use with the SearchSaasTool category_ids filter.

tools.name: SearchTechnologiesTool
tools.description: Search SaaS Browser technologies by name or category. Returns matching technology IDs for use with the SearchSaasTool technology_ids filter.

tools.name: SearchAlternativesTool
tools.description: Find alternative/competing SaaS or software products for a given website host. Returns up to 25 published alternatives with profile URLs, descriptions, and names.
